rationale: In the citing paper, Biswas and Szocs (2019) appears as a single grouped citation in the General Discussion to illustrate broader cross-modal sensory effects work. It is not used to develop the paper's hypotheses, specify its mechanism, motivate measures, or benchmark empirical findings. The core argument and evidence are built from haptics, body ownership, and psychological ownership literatures. This indicates a background mention rather than a substantive citation role.
